products.name: Banarasi Silk Sari
products.description: Exquisite Banarasi silk sari with intricate gold zari work. Perfect for weddings and festive occasions.

products.name: Cotton Printed Sari
products.description: Lightweight cotton sari with vibrant floral print. Ideal for everyday wear and casual outings.

products.name: Designer Embroidered Sari
products.description: Stunning embroidered sari with detailed mirror work and rich colour. A statement piece for celebrations.

products.name: Floral Chiffon Sari
products.description: Graceful chiffon sari in soft floral tones. Flowing and elegant for formal and semi-formal events.

products.name: Anarkali Kurtha Set
products.description: Floor-length Anarkali kurtha set with dupatta. Rich embroidery and flared silhouette for a royal look.

products.name: Cotton Straight Kurtha
products.description: Comfortable straight-cut cotton kurtha with block print detailing. Easy to style for all-day wear.

products.name: Palazzo Kurtha Set
products.description: Stylish kurtha paired with wide-leg palazzo pants. Modern fusion look suitable for festive gatherings.

products.name: Silk Sirak
products.description: Traditional silk sirak with rich colour and fine finish. Timeless ethnic wear for festive occasions.

products.name: Printed Cotton Sirak
products.description: Breezy printed cotton sirak for everyday comfort. Available in multiple vibrant prints.

products.name: Embroidered Dasana
products.description: Elegantly embroidered dasana in pastel tones. Beautifully crafted for traditional ceremonies and celebrations.

products.name: Festive Chakla
products.description: Traditional chakla with decorative border and fine weave. Perfect for religious and cultural functions.

products.name: Linen Sari
